summary: Iteration 74 tested the NEW Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090 feature with 4 documents (DOP, CE, Piano di Controllo, Rapporto VT). All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend tests confirmed all 4 cards are present in CommessaOpsPanel with PDF download buttons, and PreventivoEditorPage has numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno input fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Fascicolo Tecnico router correctly registered at /api/fascicolo-tecnico with 5 endpoints (GET/PUT data, 4 PDF endpoints)
DEFAULT_PHASES constant provides 16 default control phases for Piano di Controllo (lines 182-199 in pdf_fascicolo_tecnico.py)
All 4 PDF generators use WeasyPrint with shared BASE_CSS for consistent styling
Piano Controllo PDF uses landscape A4 orientation (@page { size: A4 landscape })
FascicoloData model includes all editable fields for DOP, CE, Piano Controllo, and Rapporto VT
Frontend CommessaOpsPanel.js has Fascicolo Tecnico section with 4 cards and PDF download buttons (lines 1153-1196)
PreventivoEditorPage has numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno inputs with data-testid attributes (lines 482-483)
test_credentials: ft_user_*, fe_ft_user_* session tokens (all cleaned up after tests)
seed_data_creation: Created test commesse for fascicolo tecnico PDF generation tests. All cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 adds Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090 feature. Key endpoints: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns fascicolo data with 16 default control phases. PUT /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} saves editable data. 4 PDF endpoints: /dop-pdf, /ce-pdf, /piano-controllo-pdf, /rapporto-vt-pdf. All endpoints require auth (return 401 without token). Frontend shows 4 cards in CommessaOpsPanel with PDF download buttons. Preventivo has numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno fields.

get_fascicolo_default_phases.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns default fascicolo data with 16 default phases for Piano Controllo

put_fascicolo_editable_data.details: PUT /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} saves editable data to commessa.fascicolo_tecnico

dop_pdf_generation.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-pdf returns valid PDF (application/pdf content type)

auth_required_all_endpoints.details: All 6 fascicolo endpoints return 401 without auth token

preventivo_disegno_fields.details: POST /api/preventivi creates preventivo with numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno fields

frontend_fascicolo_section.details: CommessaOpsPanel has 'Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090' section with 4 cards (DOP, CE, Piano Controllo, Rapporto VT)

frontend_pdf_download_buttons.details: Each card has a PDF download button with data-testid (btn-download-dop, btn-download-ce, etc.)

frontend_preventivo_disegno_inputs.details: PreventivoEditorPage has numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno input fields in Riferimento tab
